channel.title: mikrotik on Colin Murphy's site
channel.description: Recent content in mikrotik on Colin Murphy's site

item.title: Creating a wireless bridge using a MikroTik router
item.description: I have some devices on my local network that are wired-only, or have unreliable Wi-Fi. Instead of running ethernet to the room that contains these devices, I opted to create a wireless bridge using a MikroTik hAP AC^2 wireless router I had lying around. For those who are unaware, a wireless bridge is a router configuration that “bridges”, or links, the network connection of a wired device to a wireless network.
